title.en: MACHINES FOR MAKING CIGARS OR CIGARETTES

Tobacco-feeding devices with or without means for dividing the tobacco into measured quantities
Devices for cutting cigar binders or wrappers
Making tobacco bunches
Treating bunches
Applying the wrapper
Final treatment of cigars, e.g. sorting
Complete manufacture of cigars; Combinations of two or more elements of cigar manufacture
Making cigarettes; Making tipping materials for, or attaching filters or mouthpieces to, cigars or cigarettes
{Feeding arrangements for individual paper wrappers}
{Treatment of cigarette paper}
Making cigarettes for simulated smoking devices
Cigarette-filling machines
Machines with aprons and tables for wrapping

Cutting the ends of filled and rolled cigarettes

Separating, ordering, counting or examining cigarettes (in relation to packaging B65B19/00); Regulating the feeding of tobacco according to rod or cigarette condition
Adaptations of conveying apparatus for transporting cigarettes from making machine to packaging machine

Machines combined with printing devices
Tobacco feeding devices (regulating feed according to rod or cigarette condition A24C5/34)
Hand-driven apparatus for making cigarettes
Making paper tubes for cigarettes (making paper tubes in general B31C)
